---
title: "Curriculum Vitae ([pdf](cv.pdf))"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    author: Emma Fuleky
    pdf-engine: weasyprint
format-links: [pdf]
css: styles/cv.css
updated: "June 26, 2026"
header-includes:
  - |
    <style>
      :root { --updated-text: "Updated: {{< meta updated >}}"; }
    </style>
---

::: {.print-only .contact-block} 
Cell: +1 (808) 807-8383 · Email: efuleky27@punahou.edu
:::

::: {.no-print .contact-block}
*Updated: {{< meta updated >}}*
:::

::: {.no-print .contact-block}
### Contact

**Emma Fuleky**  
Punahou School, Honolulu, HI  
Cell: +1 (808) 807-8383 · [efuleky27@punahou.edu](mailto:efuleky27@punahou.edu)
:::

### Education

- **Punahou School, Honolulu, HI** [Expected June 2027]{.cvdate}
  - High School Diploma
  - GPA: 3.95/4
  - 8 Honors Classes
  - 8 AP Classes

### Awards

- **2026**
  - International Science and Engineering Fair (ISEF) affiliated awards:
    - District: Yale Science and Engineering Award
    - State: 1st place in Physics and Astronomy Category; NASA Earth System Science Award; Hawaii Astronomical Society Award; Overall top 12 project out of more than 100 projects
    - International: ISEF 2026 Finalist in Phoenix, Arizona; New American University Merit Scholarship Award from Arizona State University; Finalist for Society of Science Alumni special award
  - Best Delegate at International Model UN conference
  - National Honors Society, completed 150 hours of community work

- **2025**
  - Excellent Punahou Student award in Chemistry Honors
  - Outstanding Punahou Student award in AP Chemistry and AP Physics 1 & 2

- **2024**
  - Outstanding Punahou Student award in Biology Honors
  - 1st Place Award in Beginning Public Forum

### Activities and Leadership

- **Science**
  - Founder and Leader, Punahou Research and Science Club [2025 — present]{.cvdate}
  - Established the first research club at Punahou to introduce students to the scientific method and research process
  - Invited and hosted professors from the University of Hawaiʻi to speak about their research and professions
  - Mentored students through the scientific research process and helped them qualify for state and international science fairs

- **Astronomy**
  - Co-President, Punahou Astronomy Club [2024 — present]{.cvdate}
  - Organized star and planet observation parties
  - Held presentations on the Solar System, comets and meteorites, the lunar landing, and telescope parts
  - Initiated astronomy-related projects, built and coded a radio telescope, and organized community outreach at museums

- **Communication and Debate**
  - Member, Punahou Debate Team [2023 — present]{.cvdate}
  - Participated in 10 tournaments at county and state level and qualified to state championship twice
  - Member, Punahou Model UN [2023 — present]{.cvdate}
  - Participated in beginner and advanced committees on worldwide issues including world peace, climate change, and pandemic-related challenges

- **Fundraising and Community Service**
  - Food Division Head, Punahou Carnival [2025 — 2026]{.cvdate}
  - Led and trained 130 students across 13 food booths, managed shifts and supplies, and contributed more than 200 hours of leadership experience
  - Punahou Student Ambassador [2021 — present]{.cvdate}
  - Guided new families through Punahou and contributed more than 50 hours of community service
  - Hawaii Hungarian School Association [2013 — present]{.cvdate}
  - Contributed more than 400 hours of leadership experience as a camp counselor and language/cultural mentor

### Science Projects

- **2025** — PBHs and Dark Matter: The Link Between the Early Universe and Modern Cosmology
  - State Science Fair Finalist
- **2026** — Disentangling the Cosmic Web: The Relationship Between Walls and Other Cosmic Structures
  - Link: https://efuleky27.github.io/disperse/
  - International Science and Engineering Fair Finalist

### Skills

- **Languages and Writing**
  - Proficient in English and Hungarian (native speaker)
  - Conversational proficiency in Spanish
  - Persuasive writing and poetry

- **Soft Skills**
  - Public speaking, communication, teamwork, leadership, organization, creativity, and working well under pressure

- **Programming**
  - Python

### Athletics and Dance

- Open Water Swimming: regular participant in Waikiki Swim Club and biathlon races, Waikiki Roughwater Swim, and the Crossing of Lake Balaton, Hungary
- Dance: regular stage performances with the Punahou ballet and jazz ballet ensembles

The Review of Economics and Statistics; Journal of International Money and Finance; Journal of Banking and Finance; Journal of Money, Credit and Banking; Studies in Nonlinear Dynamics and Econometrics; Journal of Environmental Economics and Management; Journal of the Association of Environmental and Resource Economists; Asian Economic Journal; Annals of Tourism Research; Tourism Analysis; Czech Journal of Economics and Finance; Emerging Markets Finance and Trade; Contemporary Economic Policy; Applied Economics; Journal of Policy Research in Tourism, Leisure and Events; International Economics; Economic Modelling; Empirical Economics; Emerging Markets Review; Economics of Education Review; Humanities and Social Sciences Communications; The Economic Record; Environmental Monitoring and Assessment.

### Professional Affiliations

International Association for Applied Econometrics; Society for Nonlinear Dynamics and Econometrics; Italian Econometric Association; Society for the Study of Emerging Markets; Western Economic Association International; International Institute of Forecasters; Regional Science Association International; Association for University Business and Economic Research; Hawaii Economic Association (Member of the board of directors; Member of the conference committee 2016–17, 2021).

### University Service at UH

#### Senator in the Mānoa Faculty Senate

- Member of the committee on faculty service. [2016 --- 2017]{.cvdate}

#### Campus-wide oral communication assessment committee

- Set performance expectations for UH Mānoa seniors. [2015 --- 2016]{.cvdate}

#### School of Travel Industry Management

- Member of the faculty personnel committee. [2016]{.cvdate}

#### Department of Urban and Regional Planning

- Member of the faculty personnel committee. [2022]{.cvdate}

#### Social Sciences Research Institute

- Member of the research council; review seed grant and travel award applications. [2019 --- present]{.cvdate}

#### Department of Economics

- Contributor to the 5-year program review. [2015]{.cvdate}
- In charge of the weekly seminar series. [2015 --- 2017]{.cvdate}
- In charge of communication/outreach/website/working papers. [2014 --- 2016, 2022 --- 2024]{.cvdate}
- In charge of software and equipment requests. [2013 --- 2016, 2020 --- 2022]{.cvdate}
- Member of the graduate committee; admissions; student database development. [2011 --- 2016, 2023 --- 2025]{.cvdate}
- Member of the undergraduate committee. [2018 --- 2020, 2022 --- 2023]{.cvdate}

#### UHERO

- Chair of the forecast committee; in charge of forecasting methodology development. [2012 --- present]{.cvdate}
- Member of the recruitment and faculty personnel committee. [2016 --- present]{.cvdate}
- Chair of the faculty personnel committee. [2016 --- 2017]{.cvdate}
- Member of the data committee; in charge of data management and workflow. [2011 --- present]{.cvdate}

### Languages and Software

English (fluent), Hungarian (fluent), Slovak (fluent), Czech (fluent), German (advanced).  
R, Python, C, Git, Gekko, EViews, Aremos, LaTeX, macOS, Microsoft Office.
